mattressPackages.name: Single Standard (Paket)
mattressPackages.description: Kasur busa single ukuran standar cocok untuk 1 orang. Dilengkapi sprei bersih dan bantal.
mattressPackages.description_en: Standard single foam mattress suitable for 1 person. Comes with clean sheets and a pillow.

mattressPackages.name: Single Super (Paket)
mattressPackages.description: Kasur busa single ukuran lebih lebar. Lebih lega untuk tidur sendiri. Termasuk sprei dan bantal.
mattressPackages.description_en: Extra-wide single foam mattress. More spacious for solo sleeping. Includes sheets and a pillow.

mattressPackages.name: Double (Paket)
mattressPackages.description: Kasur busa ukuran double cocok untuk 1-2 orang. Pas untuk pasangan atau yang suka ruang tidur lebih luas. Dilengkapi sprei dan bantal.
mattressPackages.description_en: Double-sized foam mattress suitable for 1-2 people. Perfect for couples or those who prefer more sleeping space. Comes with sheets and pillows.

mattressPackages.name: Queen (Paket)
mattressPackages.description: Kasur busa ukuran queen. Cocok untuk 2 orang dengan ruang tidur yang nyaman. Termasuk sprei dan 2 bantal.
mattressPackages.description_en: Queen-sized foam mattress. Suitable for 2 people with a comfortable sleeping area. Includes sheets and 2 pillows.

mattressPackages.name: King (Paket)
mattressPackages.description: Kasur busa ukuran king, paling besar dan premium. Cocok untuk 2-3 orang atau 2 dewasa + 1 anak. Kelengkapan paket lengkap.
mattressPackages.description_en: King-sized foam mattress, our largest and most premium. Suitable for 2-3 people or 2 adults + 1 child. Complete package set.

mattressOnly.name: Single Standard (Kasur)
mattressOnly.description: Kasur busa single standar tanpa sprei dan bantal. Cocok buat yang sudah punya perlengkapan sendiri.
mattressOnly.description_en: Standard single foam mattress without sheets and pillows. Perfect for those who already have their own bedding.

mattressOnly.name: Single Super (Kasur)
mattressOnly.description: Kasur busa single ukuran lebar tanpa sprei dan bantal. Lebih lega untuk tidur sendiri.
mattressOnly.description_en: Wide single foam mattress without sheets and pillows. More spacious for sleeping alone.

mattressOnly.name: Double (Kasur)
mattressOnly.description: Kasur busa ukuran double. Tanpa sprei dan bantal. Cocok untuk tidur berdua.
mattressOnly.description_en: Double-sized foam mattress. Without sheets and pillows. Suitable for two people.

mattressOnly.name: Queen (Kasur)
mattressOnly.description: Kasur busa ukuran queen tanpa sprei dan bantal. Luas dan nyaman untuk 2 orang.
mattressOnly.description_en: Queen-sized foam mattress without sheets and pillows. Spacious and comfortable for 2 people.

mattressOnly.name: King (Kasur)
mattressOnly.description: Kasur busa ukuran king tanpa sprei dan bantal. Paling besar dan premium.
mattressOnly.description_en: King-sized foam mattress without sheets and pillows. Our largest and most premium size.

accessories.name: Extra Bantal
accessories.description: Bantal tambahan untuk kenyamanan tidur Anda. Lembut dan bersih.
accessories.description_en: Additional pillow for your sleeping comfort. Soft and clean.

accessories.name: Extra Sprei
accessories.description: Sprei bersih tambahan. Cocok untuk yang suka stok cadangan atau ganti-ganti.
accessories.description_en: Additional clean sheets. Perfect for those who like to have extra stock or change frequently.

accessories.name: Extra Selimut
accessories.description: Selimut hangat dan nyaman untuk menemani tidur Anda di Yogyakarta yang dingin.
accessories.description_en: Warm and comfortable blanket to accompany your sleep in chilly Yogyakarta.

accessories.name: Extra Guling
accessories.description: Guling tambahan. Cocok untuk dipeluk atau ganjal tidur.
accessories.description_en: Additional body pillow. Perfect for hugging or as a sleeping support.

accessories.name: Sewa TV LED 32 Inch
accessories.description: Sewa TV LED 32 inch untuk hiburan di kos, kontrakan, atau acara.
accessories.description_en: 32-inch LED TV rental for entertainment in boarding houses, rentals, or events.

accessories.name: Sewa Kipas Angin Berdiri
accessories.description: Sewa kipas angin berdiri untuk kenyamanan ruangan Anda.
accessories.description_en: Standing fan rental for your room comfort.

accessories.name: Sewa Air Cooler
accessories.description: Sewa air cooler untuk ruangan lebih sejuk. Hemat listrik dan mudah dipindah.
accessories.description_en: Air cooler rental for a cooler room. Energy efficient and easy to move.
